title: CortexRAG
description: Complexity-aware RAG engine for adaptive query handling, routing queries across difficulty tiers with sub-second latency.
longDescription: Built a complexity-aware RAG engine for adaptive query handling, routing queries across difficulty tiers — achieving 300–400ms, 700–900ms, and 1.2–1.5s latency while reducing unnecessary compute. Designed near real-time ingestion pipelines with Weaviate and Neo4j, enabling low-latency indexing and multi-hop graph reasoning across connected documents. Implemented hybrid retrieval (vector + BM25 + RRF) with cross-encoder reranking for high-precision context generation.

challenges.problem: Queries of varying complexity needed different retrieval strategies — simple lookups shouldn't invoke expensive multi-hop reasoning.
challenges.solution: Implemented a complexity classifier that routes queries across three tiers, each with optimized retrieval depth and latency budgets.

challenges.problem: Multi-hop graph reasoning across Neo4j was too slow for real-time use.
challenges.solution: Pre-computed traversal paths and cached subgraph embeddings, reducing graph query time by 60%.

title: Brain Tumor Classification System
description: Deep learning classifier for four brain tumor classes using transfer learning on 7,000+ MRI images.
longDescription: Built a deep learning classifier for four brain tumor classes using transfer learning on 7,000+ MRI images with stratified train/validation/test splits to prevent leakage. Achieved 99.85% test accuracy on a controlled held-out dataset; validated predictions using Grad-CAM for clinical interpretability. Deployed via a Flask-based REST API, integrating the model into a scalable backend inference pipeline.

title: SpillVision
description: Satellite oil spill detection system using DINOv2 Vision Transformer on Sentinel-1 SAR imagery.
longDescription: Fine-tuned Meta AI's DINOv2 Vision Transformer on Sentinel-1 SAR imagery to enable all-weather, day-and-night marine spill detection where optical surveillance fails. Designed a composite Focal-Tversky-Dice loss to handle severe class imbalance with 8 augmentation strategies including CutMix and MixUp for generalization. Achieved 99.05% accuracy, 98.24% recall, and F1 of 0.9859 on 1,684 held-out SAR images — outperforming all CNN baselines by 8.5pp in recall.
achievements: 99.05% accuracy with 98.24% recall and F1 of 0.9859
Less than 2% false-alarm rate across 5-fold cross-validation
Outperformed all CNN baselines by 8.5pp in recall
Optimized training using CLAHE, RandAugment, GridShuffle, EMA/SWA, CutMix, MixUp

title: Buy a Pixel
description: Digital ownership platform with Supabase Auth, OAuth providers, and PostgreSQL-backed RBAC.
longDescription: Built a full-stack web platform with Supabase Auth, OAuth providers, and PostgreSQL-backed RBAC for secure, role-based access. Designed API architecture supporting payment-driven workflows and modular backend system design.

title: Full-Stack Quiz Web App
description: Comprehensive quiz platform using the MERN stack with real-time scoring, timer functionality, and analytics dashboard.
longDescription: Developed a comprehensive quiz platform using the MERN stack with real-time scoring, timer functionality, and analytics dashboard. Implemented complete RESTful API with MCQ support, local storage integration for persistent sessions, and responsive user experience.
achievements: Complete MERN stack implementation with RESTful API
Real-time scoring system with MCQ support
Local storage integration for persistent sessions

title: Gas Booking Alert & LPG Leakage Detection
description: IoT-based safety system using Raspberry Pi Pico for detecting LPG leaks and managing gas refill bookings.
longDescription: Created an IoT-based safety system using Raspberry Pi Pico for detecting LPG leaks and managing gas refill bookings. Implemented real-time detection, automated booking based on usage patterns, and mobile notification system for safety alerts.
achievements: Real-time LPG leakage detection and alert system
Automated gas refill booking based on usage patterns
Mobile notification system for safety alerts
